title: nothopanax laetus
intro: Nothopanax laetus, also known as the New Zealand matipo or matipo, is a shrub-like plant native to New Zealand. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which contain compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. Traditionally, the leaves of Nothopanax laetus are used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
